name: verifiedx
description: Install and audit VerifiedX through the smallest supported seam in an existing codebase.

interface.shortDescription: Install VerifiedX into an existing repo
interface.longDescription: Inspect the current codebase, detect adapter, lower-seam, or explicit-wrapper install paths, and apply the minimal VerifiedX patch without redesigning the system.
defaultPrompt: Install VerifiedX into this repo using the least invasive supported seam.
Audit this repo's VerifiedX integration and tell me what is missing.
